posts.name: Jeremy Holmes
posts.cooked:
This is a beauty made from fruit Cecile purchased from a friend in the Hautes-Cotes de Nuits.


  • 2015 Cecile Tremblay Bourgogne La Fontaine - France, Burgundy, Bourgogne (8/24/2017)
    Very bright and punchy nose with notes of raspberry, cherry, ginger and violets. It is juicy in the mouth, with delicious fruit trimmed by a little wood spice. It has good volume and depth for its level and finishes with crunchy red fruit tartness.

Posted from CellarTracker

makes you Tremblay for the higher level stuff, n’est-ce pas?

As Elvis would say, “you are praying for the Chapelle”.

posts.name: Mark Golodetz
posts.cooked: On a serious note, does anyone know when she is getting the vineyards back from the metayage? I think I read it was somewhere around now.

posts.name: William Kelley
posts.cooked: Agreed, this is a lovely wine - and just the tip of the iceberg chez Tremblay in 2015. I helped rack the 2015 Chambolle village to tank for bottling, I’ll never forget the aromas.

posts.name: Мајкл Ристев
posts.cooked: i am curious how her wines turned out in 2015…to be honest i have not heard great things

posts.name: William Kelley
posts.cooked:
m. ristev:

i am curious how her wines turned out in 2015…to be honest i have not heard great things

Definitely wouldn’t agree with that. To me, among the wines of the vintage. John Gilman’s laudatory reviews and commentary are pretty much spot on.

posts.name: Мајкл Ристев
posts.cooked: have not read those notes and unfortunately not tasted the wines but from my understanding there was a general lack of freshness and many wines at 14.5 degrees, perhaps surmaturité. obviously there is no substitute for tasting the wines.

suggested_topics.title: 2001 Wendouree Shiraz Malbec
suggested_topics.excerpt:
This is an absolute cracker of a wine. In general terms the Shiraz Malbec has probably been my least favourite wine in the Wendouree range. Well this bottle has turned that idea on its head. 
Vibrant dark red, no sign…

suggested_topics.title: Anyone local to Wilmington NC?
suggested_topics.excerpt:
Dear Wine Friends just moved here from Brooklyn NY. 
They are looking for people to drink with. 
Mostly old world palates and good conversationalists.
